headline: 48% of Americans now struggle to pay their monthly bills
context: Up from 36% in 2021 — a 33% jump in five years. Hardest hit: women at 54% and those with consumer debt at 62%.

headline: U.S. GDP growth is slowing to 1.8% in 2026
context: Down from 2.1% in 2025. Consumers pull back while businesses pour money into AI and data centers to keep the economy moving.

headline: Three tickers making moves this week

items.reason: Joined the Nasdaq-100 on June 22 — then dropped 40% on profit-taking
14 straight years of dividend growth, now yielding 3.28%
Solana ETFs pulling inflows while Ethereum ETFs saw $708M in outflows

headline: The average U.S. household now owes $155,607
context: Total household debt hit $18.8 trillion. Mortgages lead at $12.8T, followed by $1.64T in auto loans and $1.63T in student loans.

headline: 401(k) savings rate just hit a record 14.4%
context: Employee contributions averaged a record 9.6% with employers adding 4.8%. Fidelity's recommended target is 15% — nearly there.
